description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Docker images build and push that triggers on push to the develop branch when files under util/dockerfiles/ change or on workflow dispatch. The workflow has three jobs: obtain-targets lists Docker build targets, docker-buildx-bake-base-images builds and pushes base Docker images on a self-hosted Linux runner, and docker-buildx-bake-all builds and pushes all other Docker images in parallel on self-hosted Linux runners, limited to 4 parallel jobs.
